summary: Implemented per-mode camera framing (US-089). Added FramingConfig interface to types.ts with targetDistance, lookOffset, nearClip, farClip. Added framing field to SingleRotationEntry and CompoundRotationEntry. Each of the 7 single modes in main.ts declares a framing config tuned for ~50% viewport fill (particles:4.5, ribbon:3.0, pointcloud:3.5, crystal:6.0, flowribbon:5.5, fractalgrowth:3.0, terrain:6.0 with Y lookOffset). Compound modes auto-derive framing from their primary layer at 1.15x distance. Exported getActiveFraming() from modeManager that returns the current framing, interpolating smoothly via smoothstep during mode transitions. Updated updateCamera() in cameraMotion.ts to accept an optional FramingConfig, using targetDistance as the base Z and lookOffset as bias on the look target, while preserving harmonic drift and bass modulation. Updated renderLoop.ts to pass active framing to updateCamera and dynamically update camera.near/camera.far with updateProjectionMatrix. Slightly increased posZ harmonic count from 2→3 to ensure visible Z drift across all seeds. All 2403 tests pass including all 33 new US-089 tests. Build succeeds.
